recent_trades.summary: Trimming Alphabet from 10% to 5% to reduce outsized exposure amidst negative news regarding its withdrawal from a major Pentagon AI contract.
recent_trades.reasoning: The negative sentiment from dropping out of a $100M defense contract, combined with broader tech sector weakness ahead of the Fed rate decision, justifies reducing this position. Halving the weight frees up capital and lowers idiosyncratic risk while maintaining core exposure to the company's long-term AI capabilities.
